message:
fix(sling): auto-burn stale molecules on unassigned beads to unblock re-dispatch

When gt sling fails mid-batch, beads are left OPEN with stale molecule wisps
attached. The daemon's stranded convoy scan detects these as ready work but
every re-sling attempt fails with "bead already has attached molecule(s)"
because the daemon never passes --force. Three root causes fixed:

1. collectExistingMolecules now skips closed/tombstone molecules (defense-in-depth)
2. nukeCleanupMolecules now removes the dependency bond (was only detaching +
   closing, leaving the bond that collectExistingMolecules reads)
3. Molecule guard in both executeSling and runSling auto-burns when the bead is
   unassigned (open/in_progress with no assignee) or the assignee's session is
   dead — no --force needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
